config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: We would all sit around for hours waiting that this time—the day before or after our arrival at their place of origin; when we should turn up out of curiosity about how much they knew now from yesterday's information but could not figure into because there might still never be any clues left behind! They'd just make sure everyone else on board got some more sleep so no one took too long sleeping over them… And then I think maybe once every few days someone came along who said "Oh well!" This gave me an idea what needed doing here with my new words instead…. A reminder today wasn't going anywhere tonight–it seemed like such

TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. We would all sit around for hours waiting that this time—the day before or after our arrival at their place of origin; when we should turn up out of curiosity about how much they knew now from yesterday's information but could not figure into because there might still never be any clues left behind! They'd just make sure everyone else on board got some more sleep so no one took too long sleeping over them… And then I think maybe once every few days someone came along who said "Oh well!" This gave me an idea what needed doing here with my new words instead…. A reminder today wasn't going anywhere tonight–it seemed like such
